openQuestions.question: What exact prompts should populate the cross-hub ambiguity fixture?
openQuestions.nextStep: Author fixtures in a read-only measurement packet before metadata cleanup.

openQuestions.question: Which compiled command-contract fields should become command bridge projection input?
openQuestions.nextStep: Inspect render-command-contract output and define a projection schema.

resolvedQuestions.answer: Deep-loop review metadata still carries single-pass code-audit vocabulary; sk-code and explicit boosts already own it.
Metadata owns hub/mode aliases; code owns policy guards, command bridges until generated, and calibration.
conflicts_with should be measured-pair-only, not broad peer-hub taxonomy.
Keep semantic_shadow frozen and pursue mcp-neighbor hygiene fixtures.

keyFindings.finding: deep-loop-workflows still projects code-audit/severity review terms that should move to sk-code or become explicitly loop-shaped.
parent-hub-vocab-sync does not validate the full advisor projection surface consumed by explicit/derived lanes.
Existing ambiguity checks are low-margin or synthetic stability checks, not labeled cross-hub ambiguity semantics.
Command bridge projection is hardcoded while executor delegation already demonstrates metadata-derived alias tables.
semantic_shadow should stay frozen; false-fire mitigation belongs in embedding hygiene and abstain fixtures.

ruledOutDirections: Move every explicit scorer boost into metadata
Fail every shared phrase across hubs
Use ambiguity_slice_stable as empirical ambiguity FP/FN
